name: Baseline-Systems-pi-mcp
description: MCP server that exposes the [Pi coding agent](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) as tools callable from any MCP client (Claude Code, etc.).  Designed for multi-turn design discussions and adversarial reviews using models like GLM-5.1 via OpenRouter, without making the orchestrating agent shell out to `pi` on every turn.
